retrieved_sources.title: technical_outage_guide.md
retrieved_sources.snippet: # Technical Outage Guide A technical outage should be treated as urgent when the customer reports that the service is unavailable, business-critical workflows are blocked, or multiple users are affected. Enterprise customer outages should be treated as critical by default. The operations team should check whether the issue is isolated to one user, one customer account, one region, or the entire service.
